pr.title: docs: Update documented AWS SCP limits to 10 attachments and 10,240 characters
pr.body:
AWS Organizations increased SCP quotas, but the README still reflected the old limits. This updates the documented Limits section to match current AWS quotas.

- **What changed**
  - Updated SCP attachment limit per root/OU/account from **5** to **10**.
  - Updated SCP size limit from **5,120** to **10,240** characters.
  - Kept existing citations/reference linkage intact (`[^2]`) so quota statements continue to map to AWS limits docs.

- **Scope**
  - Documentation-only change in `README.md` under **Limits**.
  - No changes to list curation content (including existing Summit Route links).

```md
- You can directly attach up to 10 SCPs to a root, OU, or account. [^2]
- SCPs have a maximum character limit of `10240` characters. [^2]
```
pr.author: Copilot
